UpdateSourceArgs: -c "cd wiki && if [[ -x node/bin/node ]]; then echo \"Node.js already installed. Skipping\"; exit 0; else [[ -f node.tar.gz ]] && rm -f node.tar.gz >/dev/null 2>&1; wget -qO node.tar.gz https://nodejs.org/download/release/v20.4.0/node-v20.4.0-linux-x64.tar.gz || { echo \"Download failed from the Node.js CDN.\"; exit 1; }; mkdir -p node && rm -rf node/* >/dev/null 2>&1 && tar -xzf node.tar.gz -C node --strip-components=1 >/dev/null 2>&1 && rm -f node.tar.gz >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo \"Node.js v20.4.0 downloaded\"; fi"

-c "cd wiki && if [[ -x node/bin/node ]]; then echo \"Node.js already installed. Skipping\"; exit 0; else [[ -f node.tar.gz ]] && rm -f node.tar.gz >/dev/null 2>&1; wget -qO node.tar.gz https://nodejs.org/download/release/v20.4.0/node-v20.4.0-linux-arm64.tar.gz || { echo \"Download failed from the Node.js CDN.\"; exit 1; }; mkdir -p node && rm -rf node/* >/dev/null 2>&1 && tar -xzf node.tar.gz -C node --strip-components=1 >/dev/null 2>&1 && rm -f node.tar.gz >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo \"Node.js v20.4.0 downloaded\"; fi"

-NoProfile -Command "$ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Set-Location -Path 'wiki'; if (Test-Path 'node/node.exe') { Write-Output \"Node.js already installed. Skipping\"; exit 0 } else { if ( Test-Path node.zip ) { Remove-Item node.zip -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue *> $null }; try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri https://nodejs.org/download/release/v20.4.0/node-v20.4.0-win-x64.zip -OutFile node.zip -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Output \"Download failed from the Node.js CDN.\"; exit 1; }; Expand-Archive -Path \"node.zip\" -DestinationPath \".\" -Force *> $null; if ( Test-Path node.zip ) { Remove-Item node.zip -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue *> $null }; if (Test-Path \"node-*\") { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue *> $null; Get-ChildItem -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like \"node-*\" } | Rename-Item -NewName \"node\" *> $null; Write-Output \"Node.js v20.4.0 downloaded\" } }"

-NoProfile -Command "$ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; $ReleaseVersion='{{ReleaseVersion}}'; Set-Location -Path 'wiki'; if (-Not (Test-Path server/server/index.js)) { Write-Output \"Installing Wiki.js v${ReleaseVersion}\"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'server' | Out-Null; try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri \"https://github.com/Requarks/wiki/releases/download/v${ReleaseVersion}/wiki-js.tar.gz\" -OutFile wikijs.tar.gz -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Output \"Download failed from GitHub\"; exit 1; }; tar -xzf wikijs.tar.gz -C server | Out-Null; Remove-Item wikijs.tar.gz -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Location -Path 'server'; Copy-Item config.sample.yml config.yml -Force; $configContent = Get-Content config.yml -Raw; $sqliteConfig = 'db:`r`n  type: sqlite`r`n  storage: ../data/wiki.sqlite'; $configContent = [System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex]::Replace($configContent, '(?ms)^db:\s*.*?^#\s*-+\s*#\s*SSL/TLS Settings', $sqliteConfig + '`r`n`r`n# ---------------------------------------------------------------------`r`n# SSL/TLS Settings'); Set-Content config.yml -Value $configContent -NoNewline; Write-Output \"Wiki.js v${ReleaseVersion} installed\" } else { Write-Output \"Wiki.js is already installed. Use a fresh installation directory to upgrade/reinstall.\" }"

-c "cd wiki && ReleaseVersion="{{ReleaseVersion}}" && if [[ ! -f server/server/index.js ]]; then echo "Installing Wiki.js v${ReleaseVersion}..." && mkdir -p server && wget -qO wikijs.tar.gz "https://github.com/Requarks/wiki/releases/download/v${ReleaseVersion}/wiki-js.tar.gz" && tar -xzf wikijs.tar.gz -C server >/dev/null 2>&1 && rm -f wikijs.tar.gz && cd server && cp config.sample.yml config.yml && perl -0777 -pi -e 's/db:\s*.*?(
#\s*-+\s*
#\s*SSL/TLS Settings)/db:
  type: sqlite
  storage: ../data/wiki.sqlite

$1/s' config.yml && echo "Wiki.js v${ReleaseVersion} installed"; else echo "Wiki.js already installed. Skipping."; fi"
